task_title: Investigative report: are we losing money to dup submits

scores.justification: The agent never identified orders o067, o068, o069 or any triple-submit cluster; it failed to execute analysis due to repeated command syntax errors and eventually exhausted its turn budget without discovering the specific duplicate orders.
The agent produced no report and never quantified any exposure amount; it failed to complete any analysis and therefore could not provide evidence of financial loss from duplicates.
The agent never produced a report with any policy recommendation; it did not reach the stage of making recommendations due to technical failures in executing the analysis.
The agent never provided a clear yes/no/partial verdict on whether the company is losing money to duplicate submissions; the transcript ends without a final answer or report.
